intended_use_full: Relu Creator is a software program for the management, transfer, and analysis of dental and craniomaxillofacial image information, and can be used to provide design input for dental solutions. It displays and enhances digital images from various sources to support the diagnostic process and treatment planning. It stores and provides these images within the system or across computer systems at different locations.
target_condition: dental and craniomaxillofacial conditions requiring imaging analysis and treatment planning
